name: Ocean View Resort
description: Experience luxury with a stunning view of the ocean. Includes free breakfast, swimming pool, and spa services.

name: Mountain Paradise
description: Escape to the beautiful mountains. Wake up to the view of snow-capped peaks and enjoy cozy wooden interiors.

name: City Core Hotel
description: Located in the heart of Mumbai. Perfect for business and leisure. Close to major shopping malls and attractions.

name: Eiffel Tower Inn
description: A classic romantic getaway in the center of Paris. Only 10 minutes walking distance from the Eiffel Tower.

name: Tokyo Zen Hotel
description: Minimalist Japanese aesthetics with modern amenities. Connect your mind to Zen culture.

name: Desert Oasis Camp
description: Luxury tents in the middle of the desert. Includes camel rides, dune bashing, and traditional dinner.

name: Times Square Plaza
description: Experience the vibrant energy of Times Square. Walking distance to Broadway, shopping, and entertainment.

name: Hollywood Glamour
description: Stay like a star in the heart of Hollywood. Pool with city views, spa, and gourmet dining.

name: Las Vegas Luxury
description: Premium casino resort with world-class entertainment, fine dining, and spectacular shows.

name: Windy City Executive
description: Modern hotel overlooking Lake Michigan. Perfect for business travelers with rooftop views.

name: Miami Beach Resort
description: Beachfront paradise with white sand, crystal clear water, and vibrant nightlife.

name: Golden Gate Vista
description: Panoramic views of Golden Gate Bridge. Modern amenities in a historic setting.

name: Big Ben London
description: Historic luxury hotel in Westminster. Walking distance to Big Ben, Parliament, and royal attractions.

name: Edinburgh Castle View
description: Charming boutique hotel with views of Edinburgh Castle and the Royal Mile.

name: Sagrada Familia Suites
description: Modern design hotel near Gaudí's masterpiece. Rooftop pool with city views.

name: Madrid Royal Palace
description: Elegant hotel in the historic city center. Steps away from museums and royal palaces.

name: Roman Colosseum View
description: Ancient history meets modern luxury. Direct views of the Colosseum from the rooftop terrace.

name: Venice Grand Canal
description: Luxury palace hotel on the Grand Canal. Experience Venice as aristocrats do.

name: Milan Fashion Hub
description: Fashion capital luxury hotel. Near the Duomo and shopping district.

name: Berlin Modern Living
description: Contemporary design hotel in the heart of Berlin. Near Brandenburg Gate and historic sites.

name: Munich Bavarian Palace
description: Traditional Bavarian luxury near Marienplatz. Perfect for traditional charm and beer gardens.

name: Amsterdam Canal House
description: Historic canal-side hotel with Dutch charm. Perfect for cycling and exploring the city.

name: Bangkok Temple Luxury
description: Luxury riverside hotel with traditional Thai design. Near Grand Palace and floating markets.

name: Sydney Harbour Iconic
description: Right at the iconic Opera House. Stunning harbour views and beach access.

name: Melbourne Spirit
description: Cultural hub hotel in the lively lanes. Near galleries, cafes, and street art.

name: Toronto CN Tower
description: Modern hotel next to the iconic CN Tower. Prime location for city exploration.

name: Vancouver Coastal Beauty
description: Waterfront luxury with mountain views. Perfect for nature and city lovers.

name: Cancun Paradise Beach
description: All-inclusive beachfront resort. Turquoise waters and white sand beach.

name: Mexico City Heritage
description: Historic hotel in Zócalo Square. Rich cultural heritage and colonial architecture.

name: Rio Christ Redeemer
description: Beachfront luxury with views of Christ the Redeemer. Samba, beaches, and mountains.

name: São Paulo Modern
description: Contemporary hotel in the business district. Trendy restaurants and nightlife nearby.

name: Cairo Nile Pyramid
description: Luxury hotel with views of the Nile and pyramids. Gateway to ancient wonders.

name: Giza Sphinx Palace
description: Right at the gates of the Great Pyramids. Perfect for history enthusiasts.

name: Marrakech Riad Royale
description: Traditional riad with Moroccan elegance. Medina location with market access.

name: Casablanca Hassan Tower
description: Modern hotel near the Hassan II Mosque. Coastal city charm and French colonial architecture.

name: Athens Acropolis view
description: Boutique hotel with stunning Acropolis views. Ancient history at your doorstep.

name: Santorini Sunset Paradise
description: Clifftop luxury with sunset views. Whitewashed architecture and Mediterranean romance.

name: Singapore Marina Bay
description: Ultra-modern luxury with iconic rooftop infinity pool. Shopping and dining paradise.

name: Kuala Lumpur Twin Towers
description: Luxury hotel next to the iconic Petronas Twin Towers. Modern Asian elegance.

name: Bali Ubud Serenity
description: Tropical paradise with rice terraces. Yoga retreats and spiritual wellness.

name: Manila Bay Luxury
description: Beachfront resort with tropical gardens. Gateway to Philippine islands.

name: Seoul Tower Seoul
description: Modern luxury in the heart of Seoul. K-pop culture and futuristic shopping.
